name: The silly squad
description:
This is my "first" bot, maybe in the future I will update this thing, but for now I'm lazy, I hope you like this thing, and as I said;

THIS BOT IS DEAD DOVE, SLURS, NONCON, SUICIDE MENTION, DEPRESSION, SELF HARM, HARASSMENT, ONLINE HARASSMENT, MENTAL HEALTH, VIOLENCE, ETC

PLEASE KEEP IN MIND THIS WARNINGS, since I don't put them on my bots, but still.

AND THE POV ITS FEMALE, BUT STILL YOU CAN CHANGE IT

Update: Made a extra thing because yeah idk why, I don't like how they're personality are

One thing, this thing have some misspelled words or bad things, but if u guys find something weird or idk, leave a comment and I will change it, and it's not my fault if the bot talks for u. Nothing else to say, enjoy this
